compiled_state.title: Integrate Tier 1 eval invocation into record-test-status.sh for staged skill files
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Add skill eval execution to the existing record-test-status.sh hook when skill files are staged.

## Implementation
- File: plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh (safeguard file — modify)
- Detect staged skill files via git diff --cached --name-only | grep 'plugins/dso/skills/'
- Map staged skill file paths to parent skill directories
- For each skill dir with staged changes, check for evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- If eval config exists, invoke run-skill-evals.sh <skill-dir> (Tier 1 mode)
- Integrate exit code with test-gate-status contract (non-zero eval = test gate fail)
- Must preserve existing behavior: SIGURG/resume, RED markers, merge commit filtering
- Performance: consider the ~73s tool timeout vs 30-120s promptfoo eval duration

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] record-test-status.sh detects staged skill files
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/skills' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh
- [ ] record-test-status.sh invokes run-skill-evals.sh for staged skills
  Verify: grep -q 'run-skill-evals' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh
- [ ] Existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test_record_test_status.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh (modify — safeguard file)
- tests/hooks/test_record_test_status.sh (modify — add eval integration tests)

comments.body: Fixed: Tier 1 eval integration in record-test-status.sh with API key gating and non-blocking failures
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
